rows.label: qev070202_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh... It's you...! You
finally came to get me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0002
rows.name:
Alright! Now I can finally say
goodbye to this primitive lifestyle![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0003
rows.name:
...You see, since the day I took off
in the Mirarian until today, I've been
living quite a fresh everyday life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_JNK0010
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev070202_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask for details on why Doctor B is in this place.

rows.label: qev070202_JNK0020
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev070202_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask how he has survived until now.

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0004
rows.name:
...It's true that I crossed the
&aз*$%z. At that point, the time
travel was pretty much a success.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0005
rows.name:
But after that, as if being pushed back,
I was thrown out into this timeline.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0006
rows.name:
The time travel failed, and
I was thrown out here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0007
rows.name:
I've been hunting native creatures
all this time to survive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0008
rows.name:
Thanks to the Mirarian, I could keep
the rain off, but it was a harsh life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0009
rows.name:
Hmm... I'm sure you have a lot of things you
want to ask... but first, won't you do
something about the idiots surrounding us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0010
rows.name:
...Oh? Did you completely fail to
notice? It seems they tailed you here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0011
rows.name:
It's probably that Earthling named
Gud who attacked you before. He must
have really wanted to see me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0012
rows.name:
I'll be inside the Mirarian,
so hurry up and deal with
them. I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev070202_SEL0031
rows.name: Nod with confidence.

rows.label: qev070202_JNK0040
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev070202_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask why Doctor B won't fight.

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0013
rows.name:
As expected of a professional in
this field. You're reliable![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0014
rows.name:
Unfortunately, due to hunting native
creatures every day, I completely ran
out of energy for my *$αf*θ gun.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0015
rows.name:
I cannot fight. Well, for a
professional like you, they
should be easy opponents, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0016
rows.name:
...Alright! Talk to me
once you are ready.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0017
rows.name: Are you ready?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0018
rows.name:
Well, for someone like you, Gud's gang
will be child's play, won't they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev070202_SEL0051
rows.name: Tell him you are ready.

rows.label: qev070202_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev070202_SEL0061
rows.name: Tell him you are not ready yet.

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0019
rows.name: Then... Let the battle begin![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0020
rows.name:
...Hey, Gud!! How long do you
plan to play hide-and-seek!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0021
rows.name:
At this rate, you will never get
your hands on my technology![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0022
rows.name:
...Good grief. I wondered where you
disappeared to, but to think you were
hiding in such a remote place.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0023
rows.name:
Hah... But this is the end. You won't
ever be able to go home again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0024
rows.name:
Alright, since you're here, I'll let
your bodyguard decide everyone's fate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0025
rows.name:
The first option: You quietly hand over
the Doctor, no one gets hurt, and
everyone finds a path to happiness...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0026
rows.name:
The second option: You foolishly resist and
are killed, and I cut out the Doctor's brain
to utilize his knowledge myself...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0027
rows.name:
...Now, which is better? As for
me, as long as I achieve my goal,
I don't care either way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_JNK0070
rows.name: "First Option"

rows.label: qev070202_SEL0071
rows.name: Confirm whether he will hurt the Doctor.

rows.label: qev070202_JNK0080
rows.name: "Third Option"

rows.label: qev070202_SEL0081
rows.name: Choose a "Third Option" to defeat Gud and survive.

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0028
rows.name:
Just how A∀Pl*℃O are you! There's
a limit to being good-natured.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0029
rows.name:
As if they would ever keep a promise!
Don't worry about me! Just fight![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0030
rows.name:
You've ruined a perfectly good answer.
Then I guess it's settled on the second
option... the massacre route.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0031
rows.name:
I've seen many foolish people like you.
But you'll quickly realize reality.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0032
rows.name:
...At the deep, dark abyss of
death. Though it'll be too late
by then. What a pitiful tale.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0033
rows.name:
Well, judging by this situation,
they won't make a move until we do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0034
rows.name:
Prepare yourself properly
and beat them to a pulp.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0035
rows.name:
...What foolish people. With
scientists kept by the likes of them,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0036
rows.name:
It would take hundreds of years just to
comprehend the knowledge I possess.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0037
rows.name:
Ultimately, they only see what's right in front
of them. Even though science is something to
be conducted while looking further ahead...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0038
rows.name:
Hmph... Well, people who only steal
from others and can't create anything
themselves wouldn't understand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_JNK0090
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev070202_SEL0091
rows.name: Agree with Doctor B's opinion.

rows.label: qev070202_JNK0100
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev070202_SEL0101
rows.name: Disagree with Doctor B's opinion.

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0039
rows.name:
Yes. However, even in this era,
there are those who attempt to
forge new history themselves.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0040
rows.name:
He's inexperienced, but Veven is one
of them. The future I came from was
built because people like that existed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0041
rows.name:
...Alright, I must also do what
I can. First of all, I need to
take the Mirarian back to NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0042
rows.name:
Hmm... Are you saying you can understand
the feelings of people like that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0043
rows.name:
Well, it's true that emulation
is one form of science.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0044
rows.name:
But if you only mimic forms without creating
anything, you will eventually be weeded out
over the long course of civilization.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0045
rows.name:
...Whatever. I must also do what
I can. First of all, I need to
take the Mirarian back to NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0046
rows.name:
Sorry, but could you gather some Banban Akaza
growing here in the Valley of Oblivion? That
will serve as fuel for the Mirarian.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0047
rows.name:
As I thought, the #η%%*x*a
appeared normally and the
&aз*$%* completely vanished...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0048
rows.name:
At this point, the time jump was
basically a success... As expected,
this world is #*з#u% a#$js*...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0049
rows.name: Hmm...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0050
rows.name:
...Hurry and gather the Banban
Akaza to fuel the Mirarian.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0051
rows.name:
I won't be able to make any progress on
my research unless I return to NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0052
rows.name:
How did it go? Did you obtain the
fuel for the Mirarian? I can fly
right away if I have that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0053
rows.name:
With this much, I should be able to make
it to NLA. Alright! Then let's depart![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0054
rows.name:
Let's meet at the lab! I still need
your help with some crucial research.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_JNK0110
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev070202_SEL0111
rows.name: Tell him to drive safely back.

rows.label: qev070202_JNK0120
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev070202_SEL0121
rows.name: Ask what the crucial research is.

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0055
rows.name: Haha, you really are a kind person![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0056
rows.name:
However! I'm teleporting through
space! There are no traffic
jams or traffic accidents![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0057
rows.name:
I will return to NLA via c#x*
faster than the speed of light![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0058
rows.name:
You have a strong sense of intellectual
curiosity! I am exactly the same![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0059
rows.name:
I will unravel the mysteries of
this world! This is no longer just
a means to return to the future.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0060
rows.name:
It is the supreme challenge bestowed
by God upon me as a scientist. No
matter what, I will elucidate it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070202_MSG0061
rows.name:
Well then... Let's go!
Mirarian, launchhhhhh!![ST:wait ]
